title: APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT - 211info
text: SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides previously used durable medical equipment, such as hospital beds, wheelchairs, walkers, crutches, canes, commodes, and toilet risers, as well as furniture and appliances. Donations are accepted. 3710 Crestline Drive Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: January-October: Tuesday noon-2pm or by appointment November-December: By appointment only Email (541) 563-3710 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 563-3710 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address such as a current utility bill or rent receipt AREA SERVED: Cities of Five Rivers, Seal Rock, Tidewater, Waldport, and Yachats (Lincoln County only) SITE HOURS: Varies by service TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: In industrial area south of Waldport schools Services: Appliance Donation Programs Furniture Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs General Appliance Provision General Medical Equipment/Supplies Provision Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - WALDPORT FOOD SHARE MATERIAL GOODS - ADVENTIST CLOTHING SHARE UTILITIES - VOUCHER ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES
